notes: 新增:账号列表支持「按重置时间」排序——右上角「⋯」菜单里选择后,重置时间最远的账号排到最前,选择会被记住;切回「默认顺序」即恢复添加顺序。刷新偶发失败时列表位置保持稳定,不会上下跳动。
notes_en: New: sort accounts by reset time — pick "By reset time" in the "⋯" menu to put the account with the furthest reset first; your choice is remembered, and you can switch back to "Default order" anytime. Account positions stay stable even when a refresh occasionally fails.
